name: Easy Layered Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer the potatoes evenly in an oiled baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Spread the corn over the potatoes, then sprinkle with green pepper, onions, and carrots.
4. Crumble the beef over the top and sprinkle with marjoram and additional salt and pepper.
5. Top with tomato sauce, spreading evenly.
6. Bake, covered, at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese and bake an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Garnish with parsley before serving.
